title: lagotis glauca subsp. stelleri
intro: Lagotis glauca subsp. stelleri, also known as Steller's Lagotis, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Russia and Central Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lagotis glauca subsp. stelleri include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
